description: A minimal, beautiful invoicing app replacing FreshBooks. Create invoices, send them with Stripe payment links, track payment status via webhooks. Single-user, Next.js 15, shadcn/ui, Drizzle + Neon Postgres. Aesthetic: clean, shadcn-inspired, DM Sans, zinc palette.
human_inputs_required: DATABASE_URL: Neon Postgres connection string. Create a project at https://neon.tech, copy the connection string.
NEXT_PUBLIC_URL: Your deployed URL, e.g. https://inv.yourdomain.com (http://localhost:3000 for dev)
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: [Needed from Phase 7] From Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API Keys (sk_test_ for dev, sk_live_ for prod)
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: [Needed from Phase 7] From Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → Add endpoint → Signing secret (whsec_...)

features.description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with Bun
steps: Run: bunx create-next-app@latest inv --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias '@/*' --turbopack
cd inv
Remove the default ESLint config (.eslintrc.json or eslint.config.mjs) — we'll replace with Oxlint
Remove default page content: replace src/app/page.tsx with a simple 'Hello inv.' placeholder
Remove default globals.css content except the Tailwind directives (@tailwind base/components/utilities or @import 'tailwindcss')
Run: bun run dev
Verify: App loads at http://localhost:3000 showing 'Hello inv.'

features.description: Configure tsgo, Oxlint, and Oxfmt
steps: Run: bun add -d @typescript/native-preview oxlint oxfmt @nkzw/oxlint-config npm-run-all2
Create file: oxlint.config.ts with: import nkzw from '@nkzw/oxlint-config'; import { defineConfig } from 'oxlint'; export default defineConfig({ extends: [nkzw] });
Create file: .oxfmtrc.jsonc with: { "organizeImports": true, "tailwindCSS": { "sortClasses": true } }

Create file: .vscode/settings.json with: { "typescript.experimental.useTsgo": true, "editor.defaultFormatter": "oxc.oxc-vscode", "editor.formatOnSave": true, "editor.codeActionsOnSave": { "source.fixAll.oxc": "explicit" } }

Update package.json scripts: "dev": "next dev --turbopack", "build": "next build", "start": "next start", "tsc": "tsgo", "lint": "oxlint", "fmt": "oxfmt --write .", "fmt:check": "oxfmt --check .", "check": "npm-run-all --parallel tsc lint fmt:check"
Remove ESLint from devDependencies if present: bun remove eslint eslint-config-next @eslint/eslintrc
Run: bun run fmt
Run: bun run check
Verify: All three checks (tsc, lint, fmt:check) pass

features.description: Initialize shadcn/ui and configure DM Sans font
steps: Run: bunx shadcn@latest init — choose: New York style, Zinc base color, CSS variables yes
Run: bunx shadcn@latest add button input label select table badge separator dropdown-menu dialog sheet tabs card
Open file: src/app/layout.tsx
Replace the default font import with: import { DM_Sans, DM_Mono } from 'next/font/google'
Configure fonts: const sans = DM_Sans({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-sans' }); const mono = DM_Mono({ weight: ['400', '500'], subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-mono' })
Apply font variables to the html element className
Update tailwind.config.ts to use the CSS variables for fontFamily.sans and fontFamily.mono
Run: bun run dev
Verify: App renders with DM Sans font

features.description: Set up Drizzle ORM with Neon Postgres
steps: Run: bun add drizzle-orm @neondatabase/serverless
Run: bun add -d drizzle-kit

Create file: .env with placeholder values for DATABASE_URL, SESSION_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_URL. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET as empty placeholders with a comment: '# Needed from Phase 7'

Create file: drizzle.config.ts with: import { defineConfig } from 'drizzle-kit'; export default defineConfig({ schema: './src/lib/db/schema.ts', out: './drizzle', dialect: 'postgresql', dbCredentials: { url: process.env.DATABASE_URL! } });
Create file: src/lib/db/index.ts — initialize Neon client with DATABASE_URL, export drizzle instance
Add scripts to package.json: "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate", "db:migrate": "drizzle-kit migrate", "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio"
Verify: bun run db:studio launches (will error on connection if no DATABASE_URL yet, that's fine)

features.description: Create users table schema
steps: Create file: src/lib/db/schema.ts
Import pgTable, uuid, text, integer, timestamp from drizzle-orm/pg-core

Define users table with columns: id (uuid, defaultRandom, primaryKey), email (text, notNull, unique), name (text, notNull), passwordHash (text, notNull), businessName (text), businessAddress (text), vatNumber (text), bankDetails (text), logoUrl (text), defaultCurrency (text, default 'EUR'), invoicePrefix (text, default 'INV'), nextInvoiceNumber (integer, default 1), createdAt (timestamp, defaultNow)
Export users table
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Create clients table schema
steps: Open file: src/lib/db/schema.ts

Add clients table with columns: id (uuid, defaultRandom, primaryKey), userId (uuid, notNull, references users.id), name (text, notNull), email (text, notNull), company (text), address (text), vatNumber (text), notes (text), defaultCurrency (text, default 'EUR'), createdAt (timestamp, defaultNow), updatedAt (timestamp, defaultNow)
Export clients table
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Create invoices and line_items table schemas
steps: Open file: src/lib/db/schema.ts
Import pgEnum, numeric, date, jsonb additionally
Create invoiceStatusEnum: pgEnum('invoice_status', ['draft', 'sent', 'paid', 'overdue', 'cancelled'])

Add invoices table with columns: id (uuid pk), userId (ref users), clientId (ref clients), number (text, unique, notNull), status (invoiceStatusEnum, default 'draft'), currency (text, default 'EUR'), issuedAt (date, notNull), dueAt (date, notNull), paidAt (date), sentAt (timestamp), subtotal (numeric 12,2), taxRate (numeric 5,2), taxAmount (numeric 12,2), total (numeric 12,2), stripePaymentLinkId (text), stripePaymentLinkUrl (text), stripePaymentIntentId (text), notes (text), internalNotes (text), reverseCharge (text, default 'false'), createdAt (timestamp), updatedAt (timestamp)

Add lineItems table with columns: id (uuid pk), invoiceId (ref invoices, onDelete cascade), description (text, notNull), quantity (numeric 10,2, notNull), unitPrice (numeric 12,2, notNull), amount (numeric 12,2, notNull), sortOrder (integer, default 0)
Export all tables and the enum
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Create activity_log table and define Drizzle relations
steps: Open file: src/lib/db/schema.ts
Add activityLog table with columns: id (uuid pk), invoiceId (ref invoices), action (text, notNull), metadata (jsonb), createdAt (timestamp, defaultNow)
Import relations from drizzle-orm
Define relations: users hasMany clients, users hasMany invoices; clients hasMany invoices; invoices hasMany lineItems, invoices hasMany activityLog, invoices belongsTo client, invoices belongsTo user
Export all relations
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Generate and run initial migration
steps: Ensure DATABASE_URL is set in .env to a real Neon connection string
Run: bun run db:generate
Inspect the generated SQL in drizzle/ folder — verify it creates all 5 tables with correct columns
Run: bun run db:migrate
Verify: All migrations show as applied, tables exist in database

features.description: Implement session-based auth middleware
steps: Create file: src/middleware.ts
Define PUBLIC paths: ['/login', '/api/webhooks']
Export middleware function: check if pathname starts with any PUBLIC path, if so NextResponse.next()
Otherwise check for 'session' cookie — if missing, redirect to /login
If session cookie value !== process.env.SESSION_SECRET, redirect to /login
Export config.matcher to exclude _next/static, _next/image, favicon.ico
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Create login page and auth action
steps: Create file: src/actions/auth.ts with 'use server' directive

Implement login action: accepts FormData, extracts password, compares hash against stored hash in env (use Node crypto.timingSafeEqual + scrypt), sets 'session' cookie with SESSION_SECRET value, redirects to /invoices
Create file: src/app/login/page.tsx — simple centered form with password input and submit button, styled with shadcn
Keep it minimal: logo mark, single password field, submit button
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Login page renders, submitting correct password redirects to app, wrong password stays on login

features.description: Create dashboard layout with header and navigation
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
Build header: left side has logo (small black square with invoice icon + 'inv.' text), nav tabs for 'Invoices' and 'Clients'
Right side of header: 'New Invoice' button (black, with plus icon from lucide-react)
Header has bottom border (border-zinc-100)
Main content area: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 py-8
Nav tabs should use Next.js Link components to /invoices and /clients
Use usePathname() to highlight active tab
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Layout renders with header, navigation works between tabs

features.description: Create shared UI components: StatusBadge and StatCard
steps: Create file: src/components/status-badge.tsx — renders invoice status as a pill badge. Colors: paid=emerald, sent=blue, draft=zinc, overdue=red, cancelled=zinc. Use shadcn Badge as base or plain span with Tailwind.
Create file: src/components/stat-card.tsx — renders label (xs, uppercase, zinc-400), value (2xl, semibold), and optional sub text (xs, zinc-400)
Create file: src/lib/utils.ts (or add to existing) — export formatCurrency(amount: number, currency: string) using Intl.NumberFormat
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors, components are properly typed

features.description: Create server actions for client CRUD
steps: Create file: src/actions/clients.ts with 'use server' directive
Import db, clients schema, eq, zod

Define createClientSchema with zod: name (string, min 1), email (string, email), company (optional string), address (optional string), vatNumber (optional string), defaultCurrency (optional string, default 'EUR')
Implement createClient action: validate with zod, insert into clients, revalidatePath('/clients')
Implement updateClient action: validate, update by id, revalidatePath
Implement deleteClient action: delete by id, revalidatePath
Note: hardcode userId for now (single user), we'll wire up proper user lookup later
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Build clients list page
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/clients/page.tsx as Server Component
Query all clients from db ordered by name
Render each client as a row: avatar circle with initials (zinc-100 bg), name + email, total invoiced amount + invoice count on right side
Rows should be clickable (Link to /clients/[id])
Add 'New Client' button in the top right
Style: clean list with hover:bg-zinc-50 transitions, generous padding
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Clients page renders (empty state is fine for now)

features.description: Build client form dialog and detail page
steps: Create file: src/components/client-form.tsx — reusable form component with fields: name, email, company, address, vatNumber, defaultCurrency (select: EUR/USD/GBP). Use shadcn Input, Label, Select components. Accepts onSubmit server action and optional initial values for editing.
Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/clients/new/page.tsx — dialog or page with client form, calls createClient action
Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/clients/[id]/page.tsx — shows client details, edit form, list of their invoices, delete button with confirmation
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Can create a new client, see it in the list, click into detail, edit, and delete

features.description: Create server actions for invoice CRUD
steps: Create file: src/actions/invoices.ts with 'use server' directive
Define createInvoiceSchema with zod: clientId (uuid), currency (string), issuedAt (string/date), dueAt (string/date), notes (optional), lineItems array of { description, quantity, unitPrice }
Implement generateInvoiceNumber: query user's nextInvoiceNumber, format as 'INV-0042', increment atomically in a transaction
Implement createInvoice action: validate, generate number, calculate subtotal/tax/total from line items, insert invoice + line items in transaction, revalidatePath
Implement updateInvoice action: validate, update invoice + replace line items (delete old, insert new) in transaction
Implement deleteInvoice action: delete by id (line items cascade), revalidatePath
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Build invoice list page with stats and filters
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/invoices/page.tsx as Server Component
Query invoices with client relation, ordered by issuedAt desc
Calculate stats: total outstanding (sent + overdue), total paid, overdue amount + count
Render 3 StatCard components at top with these values
Add filter tabs: All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Overdue — use URL search params for filter state
Render invoice table: columns = Number (mono font), Client (name + email), Amount (right-aligned, semibold), Status (StatusBadge), Issued, Due
Rows should be clickable (Link to /invoices/[id])
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Invoice list renders with stats and working filters

features.description: Build invoice creation form
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/invoices/new/page.tsx
Build form with sections: client selector (dropdown of existing clients), currency select, issue date, due date
Line items section: table with columns Description, Qty/Hrs, Rate, Amount (auto-calculated). Each row is editable. '+Add line item' button below.
Live total calculation at bottom right
Checkbox: 'Enable Stripe payment link' (default checked)
Action buttons: Cancel, Save Draft, Send Invoice
Save Draft calls createInvoice with status 'draft'
Send Invoice calls createInvoice then sendInvoice (to be implemented in phase 7)
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Can create an invoice with line items, saved to database

features.description: Build invoice detail page with side panel or full page view
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/invoices/[id]/page.tsx as Server Component
Query invoice with client and lineItems relations
Show: invoice number, client name + email, status badge, amount (large), dates (issued, due, paid if applicable), currency
Show line items table with subtotal, tax, total
If status is 'sent', show Stripe payment link status indicator
Action buttons based on status: draft → 'Send Invoice' + 'Edit'; sent → 'Send Reminder'; overdue → 'Send Overdue Notice'; all → 'Download PDF'
Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/invoices/[id]/edit/page.tsx — reuse form from 5.3 pre-populated with invoice data
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Invoice detail page renders correctly for each status

features.description: Implement invoice duplication
steps: Open file: src/actions/invoices.ts
Add duplicateInvoice action: load invoice + line items by id, create new invoice with same client, currency, line items but new number, today's issue date, status 'draft', no Stripe links
Add 'Duplicate' button to invoice detail page (5.4)
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Duplicating an invoice creates a new draft with correct data

features.description: Install react-pdf and create PDF invoice template
steps: Run: bun add @react-pdf/renderer
Create file: src/components/invoice-pdf.tsx
Import Document, Page, View, Text, StyleSheet from @react-pdf/renderer

Design the PDF layout: top section has business details (left) and invoice number + dates (right). Client details below. Line items table with headers. Totals right-aligned. Notes section. Footer with VAT number and bank details.
Typography: clean sans-serif, generous whitespace, consistent sizing
Accept typed props: invoice data including client and line items
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Create PDF generation endpoint
steps: Create file: src/app/api/invoices/[id]/pdf/route.ts
Import renderToBuffer from @react-pdf/renderer and the InvoicePdf component
Implement GET handler: query invoice with client + lineItems, render PDF, return Response with content-type application/pdf and content-disposition attachment
Add link/button to invoice detail page that opens this endpoint in new tab
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Clicking 'Download PDF' downloads a properly formatted PDF

features.description: Set up Stripe client and payment link creation — REQUIRES STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in .env
steps: Run: bun add stripe
Create file: src/lib/stripe.ts — initialize Stripe client with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
Export async function createPaymentLink(invoice): creates a Stripe payment link with price_data from invoice total, metadata includes invoiceId, returns the payment link object
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Implement Stripe webhook handler — REQUIRES STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in .env
steps: Create file: src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts
Implement POST handler: read raw body, verify stripe signature with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Handle 'checkout.session.completed' event: extract invoiceId from metadata, update invoice status to 'paid', set paidAt to current date
Log activity: insert into activityLog with action 'paid'
Return 200 response
Handle signature verification errors gracefully (return 400)
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors. Test with Stripe CLI: stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe

features.description: Set up Resend and create email templates
steps: Run: bun add resend @react-email/components
Create file: src/lib/email.ts — initialize Resend client with RESEND_API_KEY

Create file: src/emails/invoice-sent.tsx — React Email template for sending invoice. Clean design matching app aesthetic. Includes: greeting, invoice number + amount, due date, 'Pay Now' button linking to Stripe payment link, business details in footer.
Create file: src/emails/payment-received.tsx — confirmation email to yourself when payment is received.
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors

features.description: Implement sendInvoice server action (the full flow)
steps: Open file: src/actions/invoices.ts
Implement sendInvoice action that orchestrates the full send flow:
Step 1: Query invoice with client and lineItems
Step 2: Generate PDF buffer via @react-pdf/renderer renderToBuffer
Step 3: Create Stripe payment link via createPaymentLink helper
Step 4: Send email via Resend with PDF attachment and payment link
Step 5: Update invoice: status='sent', sentAt=now, store stripePaymentLinkId and stripePaymentLinkUrl
Step 6: Insert activityLog entry with action 'sent'
Step 7: revalidatePath('/invoices')
Wire up the 'Send Invoice' buttons in the UI (invoice detail page and create form)
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Sending an invoice generates PDF, creates Stripe link, sends email, updates status

features.description: Create overdue detection cron job
steps: Create file: src/app/api/cron/overdue/route.ts
Implement GET handler (Vercel Cron uses GET): query all invoices where status='sent' AND dueAt < today
Update matching invoices to status='overdue'
Insert activityLog entries for each
Add authorization: check for CRON_SECRET header to prevent unauthorized access
Create or update vercel.json: add cron config to run this endpoint daily at 9:00 AM UTC
Run: bun run tsc
Verify: No type errors. Can test manually by hitting the endpoint with correct auth header.

features.description: Implement send reminder action
steps: Open file: src/actions/invoices.ts
Implement sendReminder action: loads invoice, sends a reminder email (reuse invoice-sent template with 'reminder' flag that adjusts the copy), logs activity with action 'reminder_sent'
Wire up 'Send Reminder' button on invoice detail page for sent/overdue invoices
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Sending a reminder dispatches email and logs activity

features.description: Build settings page for business details
steps: Create file: src/app/(dashboard)/settings/page.tsx
Create file: src/actions/settings.ts with 'use server' directive
Build form sections: Business Name, Business Address (textarea), VAT Number, Bank Details (IBAN/BIC textarea), Default Currency, Invoice Prefix
Implement updateSettings action: update user record with form data
Add 'Settings' link to nav (gear icon, bottom of nav or after Clients tab)
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Can update business details, values persist on reload

features.description: Seed initial user and wire up user context
steps: Create file: scripts/seed.ts — script to create or update the single user record with email, name, hashed password. Run with: bun run scripts/seed.ts
Create file: src/lib/auth.ts — export getCurrentUser() that queries the single user (or first user) from db. Cache with React cache() for request deduplication.
Update all server actions and pages that hardcoded userId to use getCurrentUser().id instead
Update PDF template and email templates to pull business details from user record
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Business details from settings appear on PDFs and emails

features.description: Add empty states and loading states
steps: Add empty state to invoices list: illustration or icon + 'No invoices yet' + 'Create your first invoice' button
Add empty state to clients list: similar pattern
Add loading.tsx files to (dashboard)/invoices/ and (dashboard)/clients/ with skeleton components matching the layout
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Empty states show when no data, loading states flash on navigation

features.description: Mobile responsive pass
steps: Open dashboard layout: make header responsive — stack nav below logo on small screens, or use a hamburger menu
Invoice list: hide Issued and Due columns on mobile (hidden sm:table-cell), keep Number, Client, Amount, Status
Invoice form: stack 2-column grids to single column on mobile
Client list: already single-column, verify spacing is good on mobile
Invoice detail: verify readable on mobile width
Run: bun run dev and test at 375px width
Verify: All pages are usable on mobile

features.description: Add activity log to invoice detail
steps: Open file: src/app/(dashboard)/invoices/[id]/page.tsx
Query activityLog entries for this invoice, ordered by createdAt desc
Render as a simple timeline below the invoice details: small dots connected by a vertical line, each entry shows action label + timestamp
Action labels: 'Invoice created', 'Invoice sent', 'Payment received', 'Reminder sent', 'Marked overdue'
Run: bun run dev
Verify: Activity log shows on invoice detail with correct entries

final_checks: bun run check passes (tsc + oxlint + oxfmt)
Can create an invoice with line items
Can send an invoice (PDF generated, email sent, Stripe link created)
Stripe webhook correctly marks invoice as paid
PDF renders with correct business details
